description: Contract governing the handoff of detected intent objects from the Intent Detection Engine to the Constraint Class Engine.

id.description: Unique identifier for the detected intent.

raw_signal.description: Original unprocessed signal received by IDE.

normalized_signal.description: Whitespace-trimmed, lowercased canonical form of raw_signal.

intent_type.description: Categorical classification of the detected intent.

confidence.description: IDE confidence score for the intent classification. 1.0 = fully certain.

guarantees: normalized_signal is the trimmed, lowercased form of raw_signal.
intent_type is one of the defined enum values.
id is globally unique within a session.
timestamp is a valid UTC ISO-8601 string.

EMPTY_SIGNAL.description: raw_signal is empty or whitespace only.
EMPTY_SIGNAL.escalation: Log and emit IDE_ERROR event. Do not forward to CCE.

UNKNOWN_INTENT_HIGH_CONFIDENCE.escalation: Forward to CCE with INTENT_AMBIGUOUS annotation for downstream review.

CONFIDENCE_OUT_OF_RANGE.escalation: Log and emit IDE_ERROR event. Do not forward to CCE.

DUPLICATE_INTENT_ID.description: id already exists in the current session.
DUPLICATE_INTENT_ID.escalation: Log and emit IDE_ERROR event. Do not forward to CCE.
